nuggets.idea_one_liner: When forgiveness lacks boundaries, it becomes permission for continued toxicity.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Exposes the common trap of passive spirituality being used as a shield by an abuser.
nuggets.proof_quote_redacted: I worked really, really hard to try to be, you know, the Christian husband and do the right thing and practice forgiveness, but my forgiveness ended up being permission.
proof_anchor_lines: Practiced forgiveness but it turned into permission
nuggets.hook_angle_1_stakes: Your forgiveness is keeping you in the cage.
nuggets.hook_angle_2_identity: Stop being the victim of your own grace.
nuggets.hook_angle_3_mechanism: The boundary that makes forgiveness real.
nuggets.first_step_seed: Identify one repeat behavior you are tolerating under the name of 'forgiveness' and set a hard boundary.
